fields.name: subjectId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the data subject.
fields.synonyms: data subject ID, identifier, user ID

fields.name: targetEntity
fields.description: The entity or system affected by the erasure request.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current state of the erasure request.

fields.name: requestedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the erasure request was initially submitted.
fields.synonyms: submission time, creation time, request date

fields.name: executesAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the erasure process completed.
fields.synonyms: completion time, finish time, end time

fields.name: executedAt
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the erasure process completed.
fields.synonyms: completion time, finish time, end time

fields.name: cancelledAt
fields.description: Timestamp when the erasure request was cancelled.
fields.synonyms: cancellation time, cancelled timestamp, cancel date

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-form text providing additional information or context.

events.name: CANCEL_ERASURE
events.description: Signals a request cancellation during its processing lifecycle.

events.name: ErasureLoaded
events.description: Indicates that erasure request data has been successfully loaded.

events.name: ErasureLoadFailed
events.description: Indicates failure to load erasure request data.
events.synonyms: load error, failed load, data error

events.name: ErasureSaved
events.description: Indicates a new erasure request has been successfully saved.

events.name: ErasureSaveFailed
events.description: Indicates that saving the erasure request failed.

events.name: ExecuteErasure
events.description: Instructs the target atom to perform the actual delete or PII scrub for a request whose grace period has elapsed.
events.synonyms: execute, perform erasure, delete now, scrub, finalize erasure

events.name: ExecScanLoaded
events.description: Internal: grace requests due for execution.

events.name: ExecStepped
events.description: Internal: one request executed; advances the scan loop.

events.name: OPEN
events.description: Summons the erasure-requests queue (host nav/affordance requests it).
events.synonyms: open, show, review, view queue, erasure requests

overridableConfigKeys.label: Anonymize or fully delete the record?
overridableConfigKeys.description: anonymize = scrub PII fields and keep row for audit; delete = remove the row entirely.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: deletion mode, anonymize, delete, scrub or remove, retention mode

overridableConfigKeys.label: Allow data erasure (GDPR)
overridableConfigKeys.description: Let people request that their data be permanently removed. Off by default.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: enable, turn on, enforce, require, activate, apply, switch on, gdpr, erasure, right to be forgotten, data deletion, scheduled deletion, retention purge, account deletion, anonymize user data, scrub PII, delete user data

overridableConfigKeys.label: How many days before deletion is carried out?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Days between request submission and execution. The subject can cancel during this window.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: grace period, cancellation window, deletion delay, days before delete

overridableConfigKeys.label: Which fields contain personal data to scrub?
overridableConfigKeys.description: Fields the target atom nulls when anonymizing (e.g. email, name, phone).
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: PII fields, personal data fields, sensitive fields, fields to scrub

overridableConfigKeys.label: Review slot
overridableConfigKeys.description: UI slot the erasure-requests queue renders into. Defaults to the modal overlay so it never seizes the host's main content; summoned via OPEN, cleared via CLOSE.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Erasure queue table style
overridableConfigKeys.description: Visual treatment for the erasure-requests data table.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: table style, grid look, compact, spacious

overridableConfigKeys.label: Target entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity name whose records erasure requests apply to (e.g. 'CustomerAccount').
